seo.meta_title: Best Better Auth Alternatives for Next.js Developers (2026)
seo.meta_description: Looking for alternatives to Better Auth? Compare the top Next.js auth tools — Clerk, Kinde, Auth.js — and find the right fit for your project.
seo.og_title: Best Alternatives to Better Auth for Next.js
seo.og_description: Top Better Auth alternatives ranked by Next.js integration score, pricing, and developer experience.

hero.headline: Best Better Auth Alternatives for Next.js (2026)
hero.subheadline: Better Auth not quite right? Here are the top alternatives, ranked by how well they integrate with Next.js App Router.

intro_paragraphs: Better Auth is a solid choice for Next.js authentication — better auth is an open-source authentication framework for next.js applications. But depending on your budget, team size, or feature requirements, one of these alternatives might be a better fit.

faq.question: Why would I choose something over Better Auth?
faq.answer: While Better Auth scores 8/10 for Next.js integration, other tools may offer better pricing at scale (Free (Open Source) with Yes, fully open source with self-hosting), different learning curves, or features that Better Auth lacks such as requires database setup and self-hosting infrastructure, smaller ecosystem than auth0 or clerk.
